reasoning_content: The task5 build fails because RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc is missing. Let me check if there's a setup script.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cat task5_setup.sh 2>/dev/null; ls llvm/install/include/llvm/ 2>/dev/null | head -5; find llvm -name "RISCVGenRegisterInfo*" 2>/dev/null

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cat task5_setup.sh 2>/dev/null; ls llvm/install/include/llvm/ 2>/dev/null | head -5; find llvm -name \"RISCVGenRegisterInfo*\" 2>/dev/null", "summary": "Check task5 setup and RISCV files"}

summary: Check task5 setup and RISCV files
